description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding bathtub with a heavily weathered and stained exterior, giving it a distressed, industrial appearance. The surface is rough and mottled, with a mix of gray, brown, and off-white tones, suggesting it is made from concrete or stone. The interior is deep and similarly stained, with visible streaks and discoloration that add to its aged look. A simple, utilitarian faucet is mounted on one end, and a drainage hole is visible at the bottom. The bathtub's thick walls and solid construction imply significant weight and durability. There are no visible decorative elements or branding, emphasizing its utilitarian and rugged design.
description: A rectangular, heavily weathered concrete bathtub with a rough, stained surface and a simple faucet. The design is utilitarian and industrial, with visible aging and no ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the long, stained exterior wall and the deep, streaked interior.
description_view_1: Short end view highlighting the depth of the tub and the visible drainage hole at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear long side view with the faucet visible on the left and the same weathered surface texture.
description_view_3: Opposite short end view, showing the faucet mounted at the far end and the tub's thick, rough walls.
